nasb.text: “How long shall I bear with this evil congregation who are grumbling against Me? I have heard the complaints of the sons of Israel, which they are making against Me.

esv.text: “How long shall this wicked congregation grumble against me? I have heard the grumblings of the people of Israel, which they grumble against me.

cnv.text: “這惡會眾向我發怨言要到幾時呢？以色列人向我所發的怨言，我都聽見了。

ccb.text: “这邪恶的会众向我发怨言要到何时呢？我已听见以色列人对我的埋怨。
